title: 🏙️ Helsinki Region — HSY (OGC API - Records catalogue)
description: OGC API - Records view of this Portolan catalogue. The same datasets and metadata as the STAC catalog (../catalog.json), expressed in the OGC API - Records record model — both are GeoJSON Features sharing the OGC API - Features foundation. Served as static cloud-native files; no catalogue server.

links.title: Same catalogue as a STAC Catalog
